title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
summary: Meanwhile, YouTube, originally the home to longer-form creator content, moved into short-form content to compete with TikTok, while also adding dedicated space for podcasts , gaming content, music, movies and TV, sports and news, shopping, and more.
